title: Americanflat Album Frame in Black - Set of 2 - Aluminium Vinyl Frame with Polished Plexiglass and Sleek Minimalist Design - Wall Mounted Vinyl Record Display Frame Hanging Hardware Included - 32x32 cm
features: Design: Black 32x32 cm (12.5x12.5 inch) album cover frame; comes with hanging hardware for hassle-free display to hang flat against the wall.
Material: Aluminium frame with a polished plexiglass front that gives a clear view of your album cover. Remove the film from both sides of the plexiglass prior to use.
Quality: Durable, gallery-style frame; the frame's front has clear plexiglass and a sturdy backboard to keep the album cover in place.
Use and Display: Perfect for 32x32 cm (12.5x12.5 inch) vinyl LP covers; LP must be removed from cover prior to framing.

Protective Packaging: Americanflat has developed exclusive proprietary packaging that safeguards picture frames during transit, ensuring they arrive safely. Order with confidence, click and add to cart today!
